payload.answer: This appears to update the existing memory from 'Sam works at Goldman' to 'Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.' Please confirm whether this is the same Sam and whether Point72 is Sam's current employer.

entity_resolution.reason: The new memory appears to refer to the same Sam as the existing memory, but the input provides only a first name and should preserve ambiguity if multiple Sams may exist.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Detected a conflict with the existing employment memory.
Generated repair options instead of committing the update as durable current memory.

repair_options: Replace the current memory 'Sam works at Goldman' with 'Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.'
Mark 'Sam works at Goldman' as historical/superseded and add 'Sam currently works at Point72.'
If this is a different Sam, create a separate Sam entity with the new Goldman-to-Point72 employment history.
Do not save the new memory until the identity of Sam is confirmed.
